title: Color Enchantment
body:
![Color Enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/084e98d7ab57ef8c63b6a5d0863ec87bede57f5e.png)
### Pack adds Color Coded Enchantment.

**Color's:**
- Curse - Dark Red
- Trident - Dark Aqua
- Mace - Dark Gray
- Spear - White
- Sword - Red
- Bow - Yellow
- Tool's - Light Purple
- Fishing Rod - Blue
- Crossbow - Gold
- Armor's - Aqua
- General - Green

Levels **11 - 256**
> for potions for enchantments

**Supported All Languages**

![images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e653ce8581789cc925e05c5905ac6206192c773d.png)
![level](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dec5b055589c5e02410e5bbff2d70083a2b77e91.png)
![enchant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37959a8eaa345245654472f16773b97d9a9a9473.png)
❤ Don't forget to **Follow**
